free_text: Energy dependence of fusion and reaction cross sections
A self-supporting natural carbon target of a
tritons and alpha-particles were identified with
delta-E-E counter telescopes, which consisted of a thin
surface barrier silicon detector and a thick Li-drifted
silicon detector for most of the measurements.
The energy spectra of protons, deuterons, tritons and
alpha-particles emitted in the reaction of Be-9 with
C-12 at a lab.angle of 12.5 degree and a beam energy
obtained via Hauser-Feshbach and optical models
.The uncertainty is reported by authors in
